strengths: Active hands-on work with agentic AI frameworks and MCP infrastructure at re:cinq, demonstrating production engagement with core technologies required for multi-agent systems
Proven distributed-systems expertise at production scale: millions of requests per second, real-time systems, async I/O, and high-performance databases (Dunnhumby)
20-year cross-domain technical breadth spanning backend, frontend, infrastructure, and DevOps, demonstrating ability to master complex emerging systems rapidly
concerns: No executive or team-leadership track record—held Senior and Staff individual contributor roles but has not scaled engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, a hard requirement for CTO
No fintech domain expertise in credit systems, payment infrastructure, trading, or regulated financial services; would require 6-12 month onboarding in core business domain
AI work has focused on infrastructure and framework support rather than designing complete multi-agent systems with autonomous decision-making, feedback loops, and continuous learning at scale

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems expertise proven at production scale
Current hands-on agentic AI framework work at re:cinq

response.justification: This candidate brings distributed-systems expertise proven at production scale plus current hands-on work on agentic AI frameworks—the core technical qualifications for the CTO role. The 20-year trajectory demonstrates proven capability to master complex systems across the stack. While executive leadership experience is limited, the demonstrated architectural thinking, technical credibility from infrastructure ownership, and current engagement with agentic systems establish a foundation for CTO growth.
